info.english_meaning: to measure time to preach to explain on time
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAm pfTag rUpeRa nEva pAWyate  parantu tatra 10.421 vela ityatra 'kAla iti pfTagDAturityeke' iti nirdeSena ayaM pAWaBedaH jYApitaH asti

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yaTA paSUnAM saNGAtaM yazwyA pAlaH prakAlayet taTA BImo gajAnIkaM gadayA samakAlayat' (BA॰BIzma॰62.63).. samakAlayat=akzipat=prAjat
